title: Onboarding Tour

header.title: Onboarding for <mono>{repo}</mono>

empty.title: Generate onboarding tour
empty.body: DevDigest indexes the repo and writes a guided tour: architecture, critical paths, how to run, a reading order, and first tasks. Takes 30–60s and ~5,000 tokens.
empty.generatingBody: This usually takes 30–60 seconds. Feel free to navigate away — it keeps running.

unavailable.title: Cannot generate until the repo is available
unavailable.body: DevDigest needs to clone and index this repository before it can generate an onboarding tour.

stale.banner: This tour may be out of date — the repo has been re-synced since it was generated.

advisory: This tour is AI-generated guidance to help you get oriented — verify anything critical against the code itself.
